mapper.select: SELECT ta.*, co.course_name, co.course_code, t.name as teacher_name, t.teacher_no, cl.class_name FROM edu_teaching_assignment ta LEFT JOIN edu_course co ON ta.course_id = co.id LEFT JOIN edu_teacher t ON ta.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN edu_class cl ON ta.class_id = cl.id WHERE ta.id = #{id}

SELECT ta.id, ta.semester, co.course_name as courseName, co.course_code as courseCode, co.credits as credit, co.hours, cl.class_name as className, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_course_selection WHERE teaching_assignment_id = ta.id) as studentCount FROM edu_teaching_assignment ta LEFT JOIN edu_course co ON ta.course_id = co.id LEFT JOIN edu_class cl ON ta.class_id = cl.id WHERE ta.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND ta.status = 1
AND ta.semester = #{semester}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_teaching_assignment ( course_id, teacher_id, class_id, semester, max_students, status ) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{classId}, #{semester}, 50, 1 )
